title: frangula citrifolia
intro: Frangula citrifolia, also known as the Garden Columbo or Citrus Colewort, is a plant species belonging to the Rhamnaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating gastrointestinal issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Frangula citrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote digestive health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Frangula citrifolia are typically made from its roots and bark, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, although it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
